mapper.sql: id, form_key, form_name, page_label, component_key, field_schema_json, scope, description, sort, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from form_catalog where form_key = #{formKey} limit 1
select from form_catalog where status = #{status} order by sort nulls last, id
select from form_catalog order by sort nulls last, id
mapper.insert: insert into form_catalog (form_key, form_name, page_label, component_key, field_schema_json, scope, description, sort, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{formKey}, #{formName}, #{pageLabel}, #{componentKey}, #{fieldSchemaJson}, #{scope}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update form_catalog set form_key = #{formKey}, form_name = #{formName}, page_label = #{pageLabel}, component_key = #{componentKey}, field_schema_json = #{fieldSchemaJson}, scope = #{scope}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
